# Product Attribute Set

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module allows to display product's Attributes in product form views thanks to the [attribute_set](https://github.com/akretion/odoo-pim/tree/12.0/attribute_set) module. It also adds a suggested link between product's Category and product's Attribute Set.

However this module **does not provide an Attribute menu** to easily manage product's Attribute as this feature is covered by the [pim_attribute_set](https://github.com/akretion/odoo-pim/tree/12.0/pim_attribute_set) module in the PIM (Product Information Management) application developed by [Akretion](https://akretion.com/)

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Usage

To understand how to create and use Attributes, please refer to the `attribute_set` module's README.

classes.name: odoo.addons.product_attribute_set.models.product.ProductTemplate

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_attribute_set.models.product.ProductTemplate._get_default_att_set
documentation:
Fill default Product's attribute_set with its Category's
default attribute_set.

The mixin 'attribute.set.owner.mixin' override the model's fields_view_get()
method which will replace the 'attributes_placeholder' by a group made up of all
the product.template's Attributes.
Each Attribute will have a conditional invisibility depending on its Attriute Sets.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_attribute_set.models.product_category.ProductCategory.write
documentation: Fill Category's products with Category's default attribute_set_id if empty

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_attribute_set.tests.test_product_attribute_set.TestProductAttributeSet.test_01_product_category_to_non_assigned_templates
documentation:
Should assign the value to only the first template as the second one already
has a value.

methods.name: odoo.addons.product_attribute_set.tests.test_product_attribute_set.TestProductAttributeSet.test_02_category_change
documentation:
When the category changes, the attribute set value is also changed based on the
value assigned in the category.
